data.title: OmniTrust Expands AutoAuth Platform with Industry-First Certified Tool & Technician Programs
data.description: OmniTrust (formerly known as INTEGRITY Security Services) has introduced a new service to provide trusted verification for security-critical automotive services. The AutoAuth platform is being expanded and offered for free to members of the ETI. This initiative aims to enhance the security measures in automotive services. The announcement was made on April 27, 2026, in Ashburn, Virginia. This development signifies a significant move in ensuring secure operations within the automotive industry.

data.title: Ex-AT&T Veteran Jen Asplund Joins MCE Systems’ Advisory Board to Advance Customer Care Growth in North America
data.description: In Dallas, MCE Systems, a leader in AI-native digital device lifecycle management (dDLM), revealed the addition of Jen Asplund to its Board of Advisors. Asplund, previously the Vice President of Mobility Customer Care at AT&T for 18 years, will strengthen the partnership between AT&T and MCE. Her role involves guiding the advancement of MCE's telecom customer care solutions in North America to enhance their value proposition. This move signifies a strategic collaboration between the two companies to drive innovation and customer experience improvements.

data.title: Block Blast! Highlights Relaxing Puzzle Play for Everyday Downtime in the U.S.
data.description: New York-based Block Blast! is emphasizing its position as a calming puzzle game tailored for United States gamers seeking simple entertainment during their daily breaks.

data.title: Now it gets real: Real money, real investment decisions, Rutgers Business School students launch $1 million Scarlet Student Fund
data.description: A Rutgers University graduate, Daniel Davidowitz, has generously donated $1 million to create an opportunity for students at the Rutgers Business School in Newark, New Jersey. This donation aims to enable students to gain valuable experience working as stock analysts and portfolio managers. This initiative was inspired by Davidowitz's collaboration with a professor from the university. The significant contribution is set to enhance the educational experience for aspiring professionals in the field of finance.

data.title: Pixee Medical Announces FDA 510(k) Clearance for Its Next-generation Solution, Knee+ NexSight, on a New Augmented Reality Platform
data.description: Pixee Medical, a leading company in Augmented Reality (AR) navigation for orthopedic surgery, has received FDA 510(k) clearance for Knee+ NexSight in BESANÇON, France. Knee+ NexSight is designed for total knee arthroplasty (TKA) on a new AR platform. This clearance allows Pixee Medical to enter the expanding U.S. market, particularly targeting ambulatory surgical centers (ASCs) prioritizing efficiency, simplicity, and cost control. Knee+ NexSight is tailored to integrate seamlessly for improved surgical procedures.

data.title: Q2 Enhances Account Takeover Protection With AI-Enabled Detection and Real-Time Response Capabilities
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Q2 unveiled new tools to assist financial institutions in combatting account takeover fraud. These tools include User Activity Monitoring and Restricted Entitlements Mode. The aim is to enhance detection capabilities and prevent fraudulent activities.

data.title: AXIA Time Expands Portfolio with Official Licensed Product of the FIFA World Cup 2026™
data.description: A brand based in Warren, New Jersey, known for crafting high-quality Swiss Made timepieces celebrating significant life accomplishments, recently revealed plans to design ultra-custom watches dedicated to countries competing in the global spotlight. The company, AXIA Time (AXIA), introduced a new line paying tribute to nations participating in the FIFA World Cup. This initiative, launched on April 27, 2026, aims to honor the essence and spirit of the prestigious event on an unprecedented scale.

data.title: BSN SPORTS Announces Acquisitions of Sports Endeavors and Lax.com to Expand Sport-Specific Offerings
data.description: BSN SPORTS, a prominent marketer, manufacturer, and distributor of team sports apparel, equipment, and gear, announced a recent merger with top brands in club soccer and lacrosse. The move capitalizes on BSN SPORTS' national reach and advanced technology. The development, disclosed on April 27, 2026, showcases the company's strategy to expand its market share and enhance its position in the industry. With this collaboration, BSN SPORTS aims to bring together its resources and expertise with the esteemed brands in club soccer and lacrosse, leveraging their combined strengths to drive innovation and growth.

data.title: Bioretec Ltd - Manager's transactions - Paavola
data.description: In Tampere, Finland, a press release was issued by Bioretec Oy on April 27, 2026, at 4:00 p.m. EEST regarding Managers' Transactions. The individual subject to the notification requirement is Tuukka Paavola, holding the position of Chief Financial Officer within the company.

data.title: Pure Lithium Appoints Renowned Battery Expert Dr. Yuan Gao to Board of Directors
data.description: In Chicago, Pure Lithium Corporation, a leading lithium metal battery technology company, has announced the appointment of Dr. Yuan Gao to its Board of Directors. Dr. Gao, a renowned inventor and battery expert, has been part of Pure Lithium's Scientific Advisory Board since October 2023. The company is excited to have Dr. Gao on board as they work towards expanding their technology efficiently.

data.title: Eco-Products Named an Official Zero Waste Partner of the San Diego Padres
data.description: A recent announcement revealed that Eco-Products® has established an Official Zero Waste Partnership with the San Diego Padres. This collaboration solidifies their existing relationship and highlights their joint efforts to enhance composting and waste diversion initiatives throughout Petco Park. The agreement, which was disclosed on April 27, 2026, signifies a significant step towards promoting sustainability.The partnership underscores years of cooperation between Eco-Products® and the San Diego Padres in their shared mission to increase eco-friendly practices. By becoming an Official Zero Waste Partner, Eco-Products® will contribute expertise and resources to further advance composting and waste diversion within the stadium. This collaboration showcases a commitment to environmental conservation and signifies a positive shift towards a more sustainable future.Through this partnership, both entities aim to drive positive change by implementing innovative solutions that prioritize waste reduction and recycling. By leveraging their combined strengths and resources, Eco-Products® and the San Diego Padres are poised to make a meaningful impact in promoting environmental responsibility. This alliance is indicative of their dedication to fostering a culture of sustainability and driving progress towards achieving zero waste goals.Overall, the partnership between Eco-Products® and the San Diego Padres represents a significant milestone in their ongoing sustainability efforts. By joining forces as Official Zero Waste Partners, they are set to make a substantial difference in promoting eco-conscious practices and advancing waste diversion initiatives within Petco Park. This collaboration sets a commendable example for other organizations looking to prioritize sustainability and environmental stewardship.

data.title: Procedure for the Payment of Dividends of ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB for 2025
data.description: The ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on April 24, 2026, approved the distribution of the Company’s 2025 profit, earmarking EUR 2,868,008 for dividend payments, equivalent to EUR 0.07 per share. The company is identified with the code 180240752 and operates from Sedos g. 35, Telšiai, LT-87101.

data.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy's purchasing rate decreases by 91% as STRC stabilizes, using common shares for growth post 16-month high.
data.description: The company that purchased Bitcoin used common shares to increase its holdings following a significant investment boosted by STRC, marking its biggest purchase in the last 16 months.

data.title: Freddy's Strengthens Development Leadership Team with Two Key Executive Appointments
data.description: A fast-casual brand recently welcomed two experienced executives to bolster its growth initiatives. Rafik Farouk, the new Vice President of Business Development, brings with him extensive experience in restaurant operations and expansion. Jackie Lobdell, appointed as the Vice President of Franchise Sales, contributes in-depth knowledge of franchise operations. These additions come as the brand aims to strategically expand, with Farouk and Lobdell providing leadership in business development and franchise sales. This move signifies the brand's commitment to further growth in the industry.
